text: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇸🇾 🇮🇷 UAE Air Force F‑16E fighters were spotted with their insignia and tail numbers painted over escorting Syrian President Ahmed al‑Sharaa’s aircraft coming from Saudi Arabia. In contrast, UAE F‑16s in regular service clearly display national markings and insignia. The absence of identifying marks seemingly suggests a effort to conceal possible UAE involvement in operations against Iran, should the aircraft be lost or filmed at low altitude. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇸🇾 🇮🇷 阿联酋空军的F-16E战斗机被发现涂掉了机徽和尾号，为从沙特阿拉伯飞来的叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmed al-Sharaa）的专机护航。相比之下，正常服役的阿联酋F-16战斗机清晰地展示着国家标志和机徽。缺乏识别标志似乎表明，如果飞机在低空被拍摄到或发生损失，阿联酋试图掩盖其可能参与针对伊朗行动的意图。@wfwitness

text: Trump:
text_zh: 特朗普：

text: Iran has inflicted significantly more damage on U.S. military bases in the Middle East than publicly disclosed. U.S. installations and equipment in Gulf countries were repeatedly attacked, including by an Iranian F-5 fighter that penetrated American air defenses. The damage is described as substantial, with repair costs potentially reaching billions of dollars. Source: NBC News
text_zh: 伊朗对中东美军基地的破坏程度远超公开披露的范围。海湾国家的美军设施和装备多次遭到袭击，其中包括一架伊朗F-5战斗机突破了美国防空系统。据描述，损失相当严重，维修费用可能高达数十亿美元。来源：NBC新闻

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has arrived in Muscat to meet with his counterparts as part of the Foreign Ministers' multi-nation visit. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Axios: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi was not expected to wait in Pakistan for the U.S. delegation, so his departure carries no special significance. The plan was for him to continue to Oman and Russia, and possibly return to Pakistan early next week to meet with U.S. envoys. Meanwhile, Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner remain in Miami, and there appears to be no progress at this stage. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐已抵达马斯喀特，作为多国外交部长访问的一部分，与同行会面。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Axios：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐原本就不打算在巴基斯坦等待美国代表团，因此他的离开并无特殊意义。计划是他继续前往阿曼和俄罗斯，并可能在下周初返回巴基斯坦与美国特使会面。与此同时，史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）仍留在迈阿密，目前看来没有任何进展。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced it killed more than 15 Hezbollah operatives in southern Lebanon over the weekend. IDF reported that a short while ago, IDF soldiers struck and eliminated three Hezbollah militants who were driving in a vehicle loaded with weapons. An additional operative riding a motorcycle in southern Lebanon, south of the Forward Defense Line, was also eliminated. In a different incident, IDF soldiers reportedly identified two armed Hezbollah militants in the Litani area, south of the Forward Defense Line and were eliminated later. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，周末在黎巴嫩南部击毙了超过15名真主党武装人员。以色列国防军报告称，不久前，以军士兵打击并消灭了三名驾驶载有武器车辆的真主党武装分子。另一名在黎巴嫩南部前沿防线以南骑摩托车的武装人员也被消灭。在另一起事件中，据报道，以军士兵在前沿防线以南的利塔尼地区发现了两名武装真主党分子，随后将他们消灭。@wfwitness

text: Prof. Michael Lynk | Former UN Special Rapporteur for Palestinian Territories Israel is practicing apartheid. Human Rights Watch, Amnesty International, even Israeli organizations like B'Tselem all agree. Israeli settlers live in occupied territory in cities, financed by Israel while Palestinians are forbidden from entering without special permits for labor work. Israeli settlers have voting rights & economic incentives, tried in civilian courts. They live close to an European standard of living. Palestinians have none of those political & legal rights, no voting power, facing daily attacks from the Israeli army & settlers. The contrast couldn't be more stark. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 迈克尔·林克教授 | 前联合国巴勒斯坦被占领土人权状况特别报告员：以色列正在实行种族隔离。人权观察、国际特赦组织，甚至像“以色列人权组织”（B'Tselem）这样的以色列组织都对此表示认同。以色列定居者居住在被占领土的城市中，并由以色列提供资金，而巴勒斯坦人若无特殊劳工许可证则被禁止进入。以色列定居者拥有投票权和经济激励，并在民事法庭受审。他们的生活水平接近欧洲标准。巴勒斯坦人则不享有任何这些政治和法律权利，没有投票权，并面临来自以色列军队和定居者的日常袭击。这种对比再鲜明不过了。完整采访

text: Nuno Felix RT @euromaximal : The Falklands aren’t, never were and never will be Argentinian. They are British, and will always be. Europe stands with Britain against all threats to its sovereignty. I fully support completely decimating Trump-puppet Milei and his corrupt government if they attack Britain. THE MALVINAS WERE, ARE, AND WILL ALWAYS BE ARGENTINE. LONG LIVE FREEDOM, DAMN IT! - Milei in English - Official Account tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @euromaximal：福克兰群岛不是、从来不是、也永远不会是阿根廷的。它们是英国的，而且永远都是。欧洲与英国站在一起，反对一切对其主权的威胁。如果特朗普的傀儡米莱及其腐败政府攻击英国，我完全支持彻底摧毁他们。马尔维纳斯群岛过去是、现在是、将来永远是阿根廷的。自由万岁，该死的！ - 米莱英文官方账号推文

Without Western weapons, intelligence, satellite data, and training, it would be completely helpless. Any illusion of peaceful coexistence with the West has already disappeared,” said Sergey Lavrov. Video is made by Grok AI tweet

In general, what happens in the Sahel doesn’t get much attention for obvious reasons, but it’s worth studying because the idea that the two Jihadist groups are engaging in perpetual war might actually end, what if they form a coalition to fight the Russian-backed states? Afghanistan scenario. - Zineb Riboua tweet

text: 📝 Праздничный дисбаланс 📝 быть Курбан-байраму выходным или не быть? В Ставропольском крае решили поэкспериментировать с праздничным календарём, но нарвались на волну недовольства населения. Губернатор Владимир Владимиров предложил сделать Курбан-байрам выходным днём и даже решил вынести это на голосование. Правда, после выхода темы на федеральный затею быстро поставили «на паузу». 🖍 Аргументом в пользу инициативы были слова о многонациональности и многоконфессиональности: дескать, раз Радоница в регионе выходной день, то и Курбан-байрам можно сделать праздничным. Вот только более 80% населения Ставрополья составляют русские, и такие предложения выглядят несоразмерно. 🚩 Да, в традиционно исламских районах подобные решения уместны, поскольку отражают реальную структуру общества. Но переносить практику в регионы с совершенно иным культурным и религиозным балансом нецелесообразно. 🏳️ Причем символично, что когда речь заходит о придании той же Пасхе полноценного государственного статуса, то сразу вспоминают про невозможность выделять одну конфессию. Но в обратную сторону этот зачастую принцип почему-то работает иначе. 📌 В целом подобные инициативы лишь создают ненужные поводы для споров там, где их можно было избежать. Вопросы межконфессионального баланса требуют аккуратности и взвешенности, а не символических шагов, которые становятся очевидным перекосом в пользу меньшинств. #религия #многонационализм #Россия ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 节日失衡 📝 古尔邦节该不该放假？斯塔夫罗波尔边疆区决定在节日历法上做些实验，结果引发了民众的不满。州长弗拉基米尔·弗拉基米罗夫提议将古尔邦节定为法定假日，甚至决定将其付诸投票。不过，在这一话题上升到联邦层面后，该计划很快被“叫停”。 🖍 支持该倡议的论据是关于多民族和多宗教的说法：既然拉多尼察节（Radonitsa）在该地区是法定假日，那么古尔邦节也可以定为节日。然而，斯塔夫罗波尔地区超过80%的人口是俄罗斯族，这样的提议显得极不相称。 🚩 是的，在传统的伊斯兰地区，此类决定是恰当的，因为它们反映了社会的真实结构。但将这种做法推广到文化和宗教平衡完全不同的地区是不切实际的。 🏳️ 具有讽刺意味的是，当谈到赋予复活节正式的国家地位时，人们立刻会想起不能偏袒单一宗教。但这一原则在反向操作时却似乎以不同的方式运作。 📌 总的来说，此类倡议只会制造不必要的争论。跨宗教平衡的问题需要谨慎和权衡，而不是采取那些明显偏向少数群体的象征性举措。 #宗教 #多民族主义 #俄罗斯 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Argentina has called for new talks with the UK over the Falkland Islands, arguing British control is “colonialism.” Foreign Minister Pablo Quirno said negotiations are needed for a “peaceful solution.” The move comes after reports the Pentagon may review support for Britain’s claim. Source: The Telegraph
text_zh: 阿根廷呼吁与英国就福克兰群岛（马尔维纳斯群岛）问题进行新一轮谈判，称英国的控制是“殖民主义”。外交部长巴勃罗·基尔诺表示，需要通过谈判达成“和平解决方案”。此前有报道称，五角大楼可能会重新评估对英国主权主张的支持。来源：每日电讯报

text: German Chancellor Merz: For too long, hardworking people in our country have felt that their efforts are no longer recognized, and that must change. It has to be clear again that if someone is able to work but deliberately chooses not to, they cannot expect others to pay for their livelihood.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：长期以来，我国勤劳的人民感到他们的努力不再得到认可，这种情况必须改变。必须再次明确，如果一个人有能力工作却故意选择不工作，他们不能指望别人来支付他们的生活费用。

text: German Chancellor Merz: Our democratic order is being attacked systematically and from many sides.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：我们的民主秩序正受到系统性的、多方面的攻击。

text: German Chancellor Merz: Those who call themselves the Alternative for Germany, ladies and gentlemen, have nothing — absolutely nothing — better to offer. Can anyone in this room think of something they would do better? We will never entrust that party with responsibility for Germany.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：女士们、先生们，那些自称“德国选择党”的人，什么也提供不了——绝对什么也提供不了。在这个房间里，有人能想到他们能做得更好的事情吗？我们永远不会把德国的责任交给那个政党。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇺🇳 The semi-official Tasnim News Agency reported a new attack targeting the vicinity of Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant. The International Atomic Energy Agency said it had received no reports of any increase in radiation levels at the facility following…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Footage showcasing the moment U.S. / Israeli airstrikes targeted anti-air encampments surrounding the Bushehr nuclear plant in southern Iran during the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇺🇳 半官方的塔斯尼姆通讯社报道称，伊朗布什尔核电站附近遭到新一轮袭击。国际原子能机构表示，在袭击发生后，尚未收到该设施辐射水平升高的报告……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 冲突期间，美国/以色列空袭针对伊朗南部布什尔核电站周围防空营地的画面。 @wfwitness

text: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: I want to thank Emmanuel once again because he clearly reiterated yesterday that if ever — God forbid — Greece needs France’s support, France will be there.
text_zh: 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯：我要再次感谢埃马纽埃尔，因为他昨天明确重申，如果——上帝保佑——希腊需要法国的支持，法国一定会伸出援手。

text: 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has arrived in Muscat to meet with his counterparts as part of the Foreign Ministers' multi-nation visit. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐已抵达马斯喀特，作为多国外交部长访问的一部分，与同行会面。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Netanyahu is expected to travel to Washington in mid-May for a potential summit with Lebanon’s President Michel Aoun. The meeting is planned for the week of May 11 but will only take place if the regional security situation allows Netanyahu to leave Israel. Source: i24NEWS
text_zh: 预计内塔尼亚胡将于5月中旬前往华盛顿，与黎巴嫩总统米歇尔·奥恩举行潜在峰会。会议计划于5月11日当周举行，但前提是地区安全局势允许内塔尼亚胡离开以色列。来源：i24NEWS

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has arrived in Muscat to meet with his counterparts as part of the Foreign Ministers' multi-nation visit. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Al Mayadeen: The Iranian side has refused to meet with the American delegation before the blockade is lifted, and Tehran insists on this position. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐已抵达马斯喀特，作为多国外交部长访问的一部分，与同行会面。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Al Mayadeen：伊朗方面拒绝在封锁解除前与美国代表团会面，德黑兰坚持这一立场。 @wfwitness

text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: Enemies are targeting our infrastructure and trying to surround us to make people dissatisfied and turn current satisfaction into discontent. People should not allow the conditions for dissatisfaction to arise. For now, we do not need people to make sacrifices, but we do need to control consumption. At home, instead of turning on 10 lights, use 2 lights—what’s the problem with that?
text_zh: 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬：敌人正在针对我们的基础设施，试图包围我们，以使民众不满，并将当前的满足感转化为不满。人民不应允许不满的条件出现。目前，我们不需要人民做出牺牲，但我们需要控制消费。在家里，与其开10盏灯，不如开2盏灯——这有什么问题吗？

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi met Pakistan Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir in Islamabad on Saturday. The Iranian Foreign Ministry reports discussions focused on the latest developments related to the ceasefire and the end of what Tehran described…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has arrived in Muscat to meet with his counterparts as part of the Foreign Ministers' multi-nation visit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐周六在伊斯兰堡会见了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅。伊朗外交部报告称，讨论重点是与停火及德黑兰所称的结束……相关的最新进展。” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐已抵达马斯喀特，作为多国外交部长访问的一部分，与同行会面。 @wfwitness

text: Now sidelined from Trump’s orbit, Tucker Carlson argues that Trump turned “America First” into a personal doctrine, noting Trump said he is “the one that decides” its meaning. Carlson says that makes it untenable: “we don’t worship men… That is idolatry.” Source: WSJ
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森目前已被排除在特朗普的圈子之外，他认为特朗普将“美国优先”变成了个人信条，并指出特朗普称自己是“决定其含义的人”。卡尔森表示，这使得该信条站不住脚：“我们不崇拜人……那是偶像崇拜。” 来源：华尔街日报

text: Tucker Carlson to WSJ: Why can’t the U.S. government act on behalf of its own citizens? This is a generational problem that didn’t start with Trump. If anything, Trump just proved the system was stronger than him.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森对华尔街日报表示：为什么美国政府不能代表其公民行事？这是一个代际问题，并非始于特朗普。如果说有什么不同的话，那就是特朗普证明了体制比他更强大。

text: Tucker Carlson to WSJ: I don’t hate Trump. I hate this war and the direction that the U.S. government is taking. I feel betrayed.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森对《华尔街日报》表示：我不恨特朗普。我恨这场战争以及美国政府正在采取的方向。我感到被背叛了。

text: Under Trump’s administration, new immigration guidance allows officials to deny green cards based on certain political views. This includes participation in pro-Palestinian protests or criticism of Israel, which can be treated as “negative” factors. Source: NYT
text_zh: 在特朗普政府领导下，新的移民指导方针允许官员根据某些政治观点拒绝发放绿卡。这包括参与亲巴勒斯坦抗议活动或批评以色列，这些行为可能被视为“负面”因素。来源：《纽约时报》

text: BIG: Israel hired Brad Parscale, a former adviser to Trump, to run a multimillion-dollar campaign aimed at influencing how AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini portray Israel. The strategy involves creating structured, factual websites designed to be picked up by AI systems, increasing the chances that pro-Israel content appears in responses. Source: Axios
text_zh: 重大消息：以色列聘请了特朗普的前顾问布拉德·帕斯卡尔（Brad Parscale），开展了一项耗资数百万美元的运动，旨在影响ChatGPT、Claude和Gemini等人工智能工具对以色列的描述方式。该策略涉及创建结构化、事实性的网站，旨在被人工智能系统抓取，从而增加亲以色列内容出现在回复中的几率。来源：Axios

text: The Iranian Foreign Minister, Abbas Araghchi, met with Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif in Pakistan.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐在巴基斯坦会见了巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Pakistani Prime Minister meets with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦总理会见伊朗外交部长阿巴斯 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix Visualization of European support The USAF airbridge to the Middle East continued at full steam this evening, with a number of C-17s hopping over through Europe. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047810648008991059/video/1 - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 关于欧洲支持的可视化：美国空军通往中东的空中桥梁今晚继续全速运转，多架C-17运输机经由欧洲中转。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047810648008991059/video/1 - OSINTtechnical 推文
